节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Router Mode
Default route mode. The page will be added to the top of the page stack.

Single route mode. If the target page already has the same url page in the page stack, the same url page closest to the top of the stack will be moved to the top of the stack. If the target page url does not exist in the page stack, route will use default route mode.

URI of the destination page, which supports the following formats: 1. Absolute path of the page, which is provided by the pages list in the config.json file. Example: pages/index/index pages/detail/detail 2. Particular path. If the URI is a slash (/), the home page is displayed.

Data that needs to be passed to the destination page during navigation. After the destination page is displayed, the parameter can be directly used for the page. For example, this.data1 (data1 is the key value of the params used for page navigation.)

Set router page stack can be recovered after application is destroyed. When router page stack is recovered, top page will be recovered, other page recovered when it backs. the default value is 'true'.
Index of the current page in the stack. NOTE: The index starts from 1 from the bottom to the top of the stack.
Name of the current page, that is, the file name.
Path of the current page.
Data that passed to the destination page during navigation.
dialog context.
Navigates to a specified page in the application based on the page URL and parameters.

Navigates to a specified page in the application based on the page URL and parameters.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of pushUrl.
@throws { BusinessError } 100002 - Uri error. The URI of the page to redirect is incorrect or does not exist
@throws { BusinessError } 100003 - Page stack error. Too many pages are pushed.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:
Internal error.
Uri error. The URI of the page to redirect is incorrect or does not exist
Page stack error. Too many pages are pushed.

节点.功能描述: Replaces the current page with another one in the application. The current page is destroyed after replacement.
